title: Adaptive Utility driven Resource Orchestration for Resilient AI (AURORA-AI)
abstract: arXiv:2606.27005v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Modern AI systems are increasingly deployed under non-stationary computational, demographic, and operational conditions in which static resource allocation strategies degrade both predictive performance and human-centric properties such as fairness and explainability. This paper presents AURORA-AI, an Adaptive Utility-driven Resource Orchestration framework for Resilient AI that unifies Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman feedback control, Lyapunov-based stability monitoring, and a fairness-aware composite utility into a single closed-loop policy.The framework continuously redistributes computational budget across a population of heterogeneous AI models so that the global utility, defined jointly over predictive performance, demographic parity, cost, latency, robustness, and interpretability, remains maximised under disruption. The framework is evaluated in a stress-rich discrete-time simulation that concurrently injects demographic bias shocks, gra

translated_title: 自适应效用驱动的弹性AI资源编排框架（AURORA-AI）
translated_abstract: 现代人工智能系统越来越多地在非平稳的计算、人口统计和运行条件下部署，在这些条件下，静态资源分配策略会降低预测性能以及公平性和可解释性等人本特性。本文提出AURORA-AI，一种面向弹性AI的自适应效用驱动资源编排框架，它将Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman反馈控制、基于Lyapunov的稳定性监控以及一个考虑公平性的复合效用函数统一到单个闭环策略中。该框架持续在异构AI模型群体间重新分配计算预算，使得全局效用——由预测性能、人口统计均等性、成本、延迟、鲁棒性和可解释性共同定义——在干扰下保持最大化。该框架在一个高压力离散时间模拟中进行了评估，该模拟同时注入了人口统计偏差冲击、梯度...
tldr: AURORA-AI通过结合HJB反馈控制、Lyapunov稳定性监控和公平性感知复合效用，实现了一个在动态干扰下持续最大化全局效用的弹性AI资源编排框架。
en_tdlr: AURORA-AI integrates HJB feedback control, Lyapunov-based stability monitoring, and a fairness-aware composite utility to create a resilient AI resource orchestration framework that continuously maximizes global utility under dynamic disruptions.
